title: Safety Coordinator
description:
1. To assist the Project team in ensuring staff and workers work in a safe and healthy environment in accordance to the safety management system setup by the Safety Officer.
  2. To ensure compliance of the permit to work system at the site and to stop & report to the Safety Officer/ Site Management of any incompatible works relating to the same.
  3. To act as the secretary of the Project WSH Committee by making aware to Nakano staff and subcontractors of the site safety activities and the required actions.
  4. To assist the Site Team in complying with the WSH Acts and Regulation.
  5. To conduct periodic safety inspection to verify level of safety compliance so that the safety standards are constantly improved.
  6. To ensure site compliance with statutory safety requirements and in-house safety rules and regulations and to report any deviations to the Safety Officer & Site Management for their consideration and actions.
  7. To assist the Safety Officer of the corrective measures to be taken on safety non-compliance and deviations in order to enhance the site safety.
  8. To update site management on any new or changes to current statutory safety requirements and also take the necessary actions.
  9. To assist/ support the Safety Officer in investigating any accident/ dangerous occurrence/ incident and recommend corrective measures to prevent recurrence.
  10. To assist/ support the Safety Officer for MOM/NEA /PUB officers on matters pertaining to safety, mosquito breeding, ECM etc and take the necessary action for their comments.
  11. To assist/ support the Safety Officer in conducting safety training and organise safety promotional activities.
  12. To ensure safety documentation is kept current and ready for MOM, NEA or ISO Audit.
  13. Carry out the works assigned for compliance with requirements of ISO 9000, ISO 14001 and OHSAS 18001.
  14. Be involved in the evaluation of risk assessment and plan, manage and review Management Programmes.
  15. Be involved in all the sub-con safety and health matters pertaining to the site.
  16. To assist/ support the Safety Officer on the site environment control Programme and ensure that the staff and workers are aware and understand the intention.
  17. Inspect the site to ensure that all facilities and equipment relevant to the maintenance of the environment health are in working condition.
  18. Assist the authority to investigate outbreaks of infectious, vector-borne disease.
  19. To assist/ support the Safety Officer in campaigns, organise training course to develop and sustain the interest of workers in maintaining good environment health standards.
  20. To assist/ support the Safety Officer in the management of the workers e.g their courses, reporting sick, home leave, accommodation.
  21. To assist in achieving the safety standards required by the site’s developer.
  22. Be involved in safety aspects for planning of activities that are in view of the public or in area that the public uses.

postedCompany.description: Nakano Singapore (Pte) Ltd is one of the leading main contractors in Singapore with over 40 years of experience in building construction. We are inviting motivated and independent team player to join our company.
postedCompany.name: NAKANO SINGAPORE (PTE) LTD
